semantic.role: Release gate automation script for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Defines and executes a sequence of quality checks (build, unit tests, schema tests, protocol validation, pack check) before a release
Ensures all gates pass in order before allowing the release to proceed
outOfScope: Actual release publishing or deployment steps
Configuration of individual test or build commands

English.purpose: This document is a Node.js script that automates the pre-release quality assurance process for the ArchSpine project. It runs a series of validation gates in sequence, stopping if any gate fails, to ensure the codebase is ready for release.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and release managers working on the ArchSpine project. It is used as part of the CI/CD pipeline or manually before creating a release.
key_takeaways: Five sequential gates: build, unit tests, schema tests, protocol validation, and pack check
Each gate must pass before the next one starts
The script exits with an error if any gate fails, preventing an unstable release

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是一个 Node.js 脚本，用于自动化 ArchSpine 项目的发布前质量保证流程。它按顺序执行一系列验证关卡，如果任何关卡失败则停止，以确保代码库准备好发布。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向 ArchSpine 项目的开发者和发布管理者。该脚本用于 CI/CD 流水线中，或在创建发布前手动执行。
key_takeaways: 五个顺序关卡：构建、单元测试、模式测试、协议验证和打包检查
每个关卡必须通过后才能进入下一个
如果任何关卡失败，脚本会报错退出，防止发布不稳定的版本
